title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!
jsonLd.skills: Customs Clearance, TMS, Last Mile Delivery, GPS Tracking Systems, Data Analytics, Inventory Management, WMS, MS Excel
